analysis_result: 8/18 MPNST WES samples (44.4%) harbor >=1 PASS non-synonymous NF1 somatic mutation.
discrepancy_analysis: Reported result (44%) and model result (44.4%) match within +/-10% relative difference (relative diff = 0.91%). The model identified 8/18 MPNST WES samples (44.4%) with >=1 PASS non-synonymous NF1 somatic mutation using the MOESM5 WES MAF and MOESM4 clinical annotation, which rounds to 44% as reported in the paper.
